name: serena-vanguard
description: Curated fork of Serena — LSP-powered semantic code agent with 49 MCP tools across 46 language servers. Symbol-level find/replace/rename, tree-sitter syntax validation, ast-grep structural search, persistent project memory, and 27 BMAD orchestration agents for multi-role development workflows (dev, architect, QA, PM, game-dev, creative).
